recommendations.title: Here Comes the Boom
recommendations.overview: A high school biology teacher moonlights as a mixed-martial arts fighter in an effort to raise money to save the school's music program.

recommendations.title: Around the World in 80 Days
recommendations.overview: A bet pits a British inventor, a Chinese thief and a French artist on a worldwide adventure that they can circle the globe in 80 days.

recommendations.title: The Waterboy
recommendations.overview: Bobby Boucher is a water boy for a struggling college football team. The coach discovers Boucher's hidden rage makes him a tackling machine whose bone-crushing power might vault his team into the playoffs.

recommendations.title: The Wedding Singer
recommendations.overview: Robbie, a local rock star turned wedding singer, is dumped on the day of his wedding. Meanwhile, waitress Julia finally sets a wedding date with her fiancée Glenn. When Julia and Robbie meet and hit it off, they find that things are more complicated

recommendations.title: The Ridiculous 6
recommendations.overview: When his long-lost outlaw father returns, Tommy "White Knife" Stockburn goes on an adventure-filled journey across the Old West with his five brothers.

recommendations.title: Blended
recommendations.overview: Recently divorced mom Lauren and widowed dad Jim let their friends push them into a blind date, which goes disastrously wrong. Unsurprisingly, neither wants to see the other ever again. However, fate intervenes when both Jim and Lauren, unbeknownst t

recommendations.title: Picture Perfect
recommendations.overview: A young advertising executive's life becomes increasingly complicated when, in order to impress her boss, she pretends to be engaged to a man she has just met.

recommendations.title: Mary Poppins
recommendations.overview: In turn of the century London, a magical nanny employs music and adventure to help two neglected children become closer to their father.

recommendations.title: The Executioner
recommendations.overview: An undertaker gets married to an old executioner's daughter and, although he doesn't like it, must continue the profession of his father-in-law after his retirement.

recommendations.title: Carol
recommendations.overview: In 1950s New York, a department-store clerk who dreams of a better life falls for an older, married woman.
